title: Stackydo Config
description: Configuration for a stackydo project or workspace. Place as `stackydo.json` in your project root or workspace directory. stackydo walks up from CWD to find this file.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI (for editor autocompletion and validation).

dir.description: Path to the task store directory, relative to this file. Overrides the STACKYDO_DIR environment variable.

stack_filter.description: Glob pattern (supports * wildcards) limiting which stacks appear in list, stats, stacks, search output, and the TUI. When absent, all stacks are shown. Does not restrict write access — use separate workspaces for isolation.

context.description: Project context metadata attached to tasks created from this directory.

description.description: Free-text notes captured as context when creating tasks. Useful for giving AI agents background about this project.
